case_title: REYES, RAUL RUIZ VS ROSSI ANTIQUES et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-19-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF MAR-14-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,828.50 FILED BY REYES, RAUL RUIZ AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSI ANTIQUES ROSSI, LUIS MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
PLTF W/INTERPRETER DECL:COURT CLERK TOLD BOTH PART IES TO GO OUTSIDE&AGREE ON A COMMON DATE,THEN GO T O S.C.WINODW TO GET ANOTHER DATE(RESET).A.DTE:4/19
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSI ANTIQUES ROSSI, LUIS MARIO
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, RAUL RUIZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROSSI ANTIQUES ROSSI, LUIS MARIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF INTERPRETER:"IF BOTH AGREED,WILL PLTF STILL T O SRV?.IF BOTH STIP.THEN DF WAIVED SRVC, BUT PLTF REP'V SAID THEY'LL SRV TO MAKE SURE.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO RAUL RUIZ REYES RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
